fields.name: Crystal Eye Palette
fields.description: 12-shade eyeshadow palette with shimmering and matte finishes. Highly pigmented and blendable.

fields.name: Into The Night
fields.description: This set include body lotion and body mist

fields.name: Endless Sea
fields.description: A peaceful vacation in a bottle. Fresh bergamot, saltwater lily, and ocean driftwood

fields.name: Gingham Gorgeous
fields.description: Fresh, vibrant, and happy. A crisp blend of blue freesia, white peach, and fresh clementine.

fields.name: Snowflakes & cashmere
fields.description: Cozy up with this soft blend of vanilla cashmere cream, caramel woods, and frosted clementine

fields.name: Pure Wonder
fields.description: A dreamy, warm blend of iced rosé, star jasmine, and warm white amber. Smells like a luxury perfume.

fields.name: Luminous
fields.description: Radiant and decadent. A luxurious blend of ruby currant, gilded iris, and praline amber

fields.name: In The Stars
fields.description: Make every moment glow with this warm, captivating scent. A mix of starflower, sandalwood musk, and sugared tangelo.

fields.name: Rose
fields.description: Clean, playful, and light. A modern mix of airy rose water, jasmine petals, and creamy musk

fields.name: Platinum
fields.description: A mesmerizing, metallic vibe you can't help but be drawn to. A bold blend of sparkling bergamot, silver blooms, and patchouli musk. Modern, magnetic, and clean.

fields.name: Japanese Cherry Blossom
fields.description: The world's most iconic fragrance. A graceful blend of Japanese cherry blossoms, Asian pear, and sandalwood. Timeless and elegant.

fields.name: Hello Beautiful
fields.description: A petal-perfect blend of white gardenia, jasmine petals, and magnolia blossom. Like walking through a fresh flower garden.

fields.name: Bourbon
fields.description: A bold, smooth blend of white pepper, dark amber, and Kentucky oak.

fields.name: Mahogany Teakwood
fields.description: The classic woodsy scent. Rich mahogany, black teakwood, and dark oak. Smells like a high-end men's cologne.

fields.name: Meet Me in Miami
fields.description: A sunny escape to South Beach. A refreshing, sun-drenched blend of breezy palm trees, cabana coladas, and sun-tanned skin. Smells like a luxury vacation in a bottle.
